key_findings: BEAUTY_PERSONAL_CARE × Evergreen (n=408, eng=4%): → indoor + mixed_ambient + documentary_candid
BEAUTY_PERSONAL_CARE × Ramadan (n=19, eng=5%): → studio + natural + lifestyle_integrated
F_AND_B × Evergreen (n=1269, eng=33%): → retail_urban + studio + multi_product
F_AND_B × General (n=164, eng=27%): → unknown + natural + text_dominant
HEALTHCARE_WELLNESS × Evergreen (n=80, eng=27%): → studio + studio + text_dominant
HEALTHCARE_WELLNESS × Ramadan (n=5, eng=20%): → unknown + natural + lifestyle_integrated
REAL_ESTATE × Evergreen (n=103, eng=2%): → office + flat_bright + text_dominant
REAL_ESTATE × Ramadan (n=3, eng=0%): → outdoor + natural + lifestyle_integrated
RETAIL_LIFESTYLE × Evergreen (n=566, eng=7%): → home_domestic + natural_daylight + lifestyle_integrated
RETAIL_LIFESTYLE × Ramadan (n=43, eng=7%): → home + natural + lifestyle_integrated
FASHION × Evergreen (n=381, eng=41%): → restaurant + studio + editorial
FASHION × Seasonal (n=53, eng=34%): → studio + studio + editorial
Best setting: 'retail_urban' (100%) → natural_daylight light + product_hero_closeup frame
how_to_use: Step 1: client sector + content occasion → look up sector_occasion_decision_tree → get recommended_production (setting, lighting, composition, register, tone). Step 2: confirm with setting_guide — use best_lighting and best_composition for that setting. Step 3: cross-check lighting_composition_guide to ensure lighting+framing alignment.
